biography: Joakim, a golfer of considerable talent, is known for his meticulous approach to the game. While details about his home club remain elusive, his dedication to golf is beyond question. Some say that he meticulously annotates his scorecards during play, keeping track of not just the score but also the conditions of each stroke.
Joakim has participated once in past Hector Trophée events. Though the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his presence on the course is always noted.

Considered to be retired from the Hector Trophée, it appears that Joakim will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026. However, in the unpredictable world of golf, last-minute changes always remain a possibility.
